item.title: Version 1.3
item.description: Custom Folder destination mode — pick any folder on your Mac (NAS, RAID, internal drive) instead of only connected SSDs. Date folders are still auto-created inside. | Light mode contrast overhaul — deeper blue and purple on all UI elements, ring, pills, and queue rows. | Smooth scrolling — all panels now use AppKit-backed momentum scrolling with elastic bounce. | Speed graph appears instantly when a transfer starts instead of after 10–15 seconds. | History panel now resets at the same broadcast-day cutoff as session stats instead of a fixed 24 hours. | Destination tabs (SSD / Custom Folder) now have a sliding pill animation, hover states, and full-area click targets. | Stale custom dest path detected on launch — orange warning shown if the chosen folder is missing or unmounted. | Several edge-case fixes: canIngest no longer does sync filesystem I/O on every render, SmoothScrollView now correctly tracks content height changes, card-detection scan excludes the custom destination volume.

item.title: Version 1.4
item.description: Sparkle auto-update now works — existing users will receive this and all future updates automatically. | Custom date filter — pick any specific date from a graphical calendar or type MM/DD/YYYY; the calendar opens on any click in the date field. | Debug mode — new toggle in Advanced settings reveals the Log panel and Dry Run toggle; both are hidden by default for a cleaner UI. | Daily log rotation — logs now roll over each day and are kept for 7 days (replaces size-based rotation). | Transfer speed fix — eliminated a near-100% hang caused by O(n²) manifest lookups during large card ingests. | History section moved to the left column below today's session summary. | Destination path preview updates dynamically — shows your actual chosen folder name and date format instead of a hardcoded placeholder. | Build plumbing: static Info.plist replaces generated one so Sparkle keys are always present in the bundle.

item.title: Version 1.4.1
item.description: Project scaffold with customisable folder templates, date range filter for ingest, inline folder rename, new project folder popover with scaffold preview
